positive: A highly stylized and symmetrical composition featuring a whimsical celestial landscape: crescent moons, swirling nebulae in deep sapphire and ethereal gold tones, and silhouettes of mythological creatures (e.g., flying griffin-like forms, stylized cosmic foxes). The overall aesthetic is Art Nouveau mixed with modern cosmic pop art. The composition must be centered, with high contrast between the dark space background and the luminous, glowing subjects. Use clean linework and a graphic, vectorized quality suitable for screen printing on apparel. The overall mood is magical and serene. Full bleed design.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, trademark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grain, low detail, messy lines, photorealism, dirty, grunge, human figures, realistic sky, cartoon, childish
